content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.02%, IT crashing -4.36%, VIX spiking +3.39% to 19.22, and global cues negative (Nasdaq -0.89%). Book is already 67% deployed with 7 of 8 positions showing mixed-to-negative P&L on the session. This is a risk-off tape — focus is position management, not new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -6.5% but SL at 75 still intact (CMP 76.24). Strong Q4 results (+34.89% PAT), PSU bank sector leader on fundamentals, HDFC Sec target Rs 90. Thesis intact; let SL do its job. No tightening warranted — position already near SL and tightening further would be whipsaw-prone given ATR."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1004.50,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Best performer +4.0%. Current SL 1004.50 already above entry 984 — breakeven+ locked. Leaving SL unchanged given choppy tape and 52w high proximity gives room for momentum to run toward 1100. No-op MODIFY guard: current SL matches stored SL — converting to HOLD in position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge against VIX spike and geopolitical risk. Small loss (-1.1%), SL at 119 provides ~3.8% downside buffer. Thesis (safe-haven in volatile tape) intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1405.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high, FMCG defensive holding up (+0.25%) in -1% tape. Blockbuster Q4 print already published. Current SL 1405 already near breakeven (entry 1412.94). Not tightening further — stock is volatile into Q4 read-through, need breathing room. Keeping existing levels; reflecting as HOLD in position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high with 2.2x volume, bullish Marubozu on 04-21. P&L roughly flat. Raising SL from 1049 to 1035 (7 bps below today's low 1047.45) — wait, that would loosen SL. Current SL is 1049 which is essentially at entry. Cannot loosen. Keeping SL at 1049 (breakeven protection already achieved). No-op — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+0.6%, near 52w high. Q4 earnings Apr 29 is a binary event — 5 days out. At top of analyst target band (Rs 587-687). SL at 675 gives ~1.7% room; appropriate risk management pre-event. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -2.6% today on broad FMCG pullback but SL 2260 still intact (CMP 2313). Q4 results Apr 30 upcoming. Thesis (rural recovery + Nestle read-through) intact. Keep existing SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-1.0%, SL 393 intact. Q4 May 15, summer peak demand catalyst. Energy sector holding up better than IT. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact per Q4 results. Let existing SL 75.00 work — stock is ~1.6% above SL, tightening further would whipsaw."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1004.50 (above entry 984) — breakeven+ locked. If stock closes above 1030 today, will consider trailing to 1010 tomorrow."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position in a risk-off tape. SL 119 gives adequate buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1405 essentially at breakeven. Stock volatile near 52w high; not tightening further would risk stop-out on noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1049 at entry = breakeven protection. Intraday low 1047.45 nearly triggered SL; any tighter SL would have knocked us out. Let the trade breathe."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Pre-earnings (Apr 29) hold with SL 675. No need to tighten — wait for results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Weakest position today but still 2.3% above SL. Q4 results Apr 30 is key catalyst — let the SL work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 393 intact, ~1.75% below CMP. Energy sector defensive anchor."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GVT&D, HSCL, OFSS, CLEAN showing institutional flow but in a VIX-spiking, IT-crashing tape stacking more longs into capital goods/chemicals would compound correlation risk. Waiting for market to find footing (Nifty hold 23900) before adding. Pharma ETF/DIVISLAB worth monitoring as defensive but already have GRANULES exposure in healthcare.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 67% deployed, nearing the 60% hysteresis threshold with net-flat session P&L. VIX +3.39%, Nifty IT -4.36%, global cues red — not an accumulation tape. Correct stance is NO new entries, focus on defending existing positions. 5 of 8 holdings have SL at or very near entry (breakeven protected) which is good risk management for day 5. Cluster check: 3 financials (MAHABANK, PNBHOUSING, AUBANK) = ~28% of capital — at the edge of cluster limits, another financial add is OFF the table. Next tick priorities: (1) trail PNBHOUSING SL to 1010+ if it closes strong, (2) revisit MAHABANK if PSU bank sector rebounds."
}
